mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, textbook_id, textbook_title, buyer_id, buyer_name, buyer_phone, buyer_major, buyer_grade, seller_id, seller_name, seller_phone, seller_major, seller_grade, price, meeting_time, meeting_location, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{textbookId}, #{textbookTitle}, #{buyerId}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerPhone}, #{buyerMajor}, #{buyerGrade}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerName}, #{sellerPhone}, #{sellerMajor}, #{sellerGrade}, #{price}, #{meetingTime}, #{meetingLocation}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId} AND buyer_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND seller_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM orders WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND status IN ('waiting_seller_confirm', 'waiting_meeting')
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET buyer_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET seller_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
